evals.expected_output: Skill reads config and state, picks the first uncompleted task, forks/syncs the repo, spawns an agent to implement it, opens a PR, updates agent-tasks-state.yml, and prints a summary with progress and next-up.

evals.prompt: Run agent-tasks — no state file yet, this is the first day.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects no state file, treats all tasks as pending, picks the very first task in the config, completes it, creates agent-tasks-state.yml with that entry.

evals.prompt: Do the next repo task. The repo isn't forked yet.
evals.expected_output: Skill forks the repo, clones it, branches, spawns agent, opens PR, records in state.

evals.prompt: Run agent-tasks.yml. All tasks are already in the state file.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects all tasks are completed and tells the user — nothing left to do.

evals.prompt: Process the next item in my agent-tasks queue. Show me what's left after.
evals.expected_output: Skill completes one task and prints a progress line (e.g. '3 of 7 tasks completed') plus a 'Next up' line showing the following pending task.
